name: equilibre-planner
description: Menus equilibres saisonniers et planning d'activites physiques adaptatif

scripts.build: tsc && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && node scripts/copy-preload.cjs
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently "vite" "tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json -w" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && node scripts/copy-preload.cjs && electron ."
